nasb.text: But let the righteous be glad; let them exult before God; Yes, let them rejoice with gladness.

esv.text: But the righteous shall be glad; they shall exult before God; they shall be jubilant with joy!

cnv.text: 但願義人在　神面前歡喜快樂； 願他們高興快樂。

ccb.text: 愿义人在上帝面前欢欣快乐， 愿他们高兴欢喜。

csbs.text: 但愿义人欢喜，在神面前欢庆； 愿他们喜乐欢欣。
